forecasts.short: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain showers between 8pm and 11pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. South wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
